strategy: Round 1 he opens with a -85% Tower Shield and replaces it every time he takes damage - do not hit into it.

Strip it for free with his Halberd cheat: keep a cheap shield on a wizard who is NOT the last target of his every-other-round 450 Star AoE. The AoE stops on that wizard, and Kaizoku cleanses all wards off them and himself - Tower Shield included - without replacing it.
Alternatively, ward-removal spells like Steal Ward or Shatter take the Tower Shield without triggering a replacement.
Hit with Ice or Storm (+35%). He resists Fire 80%, so Fire wizards bring a prism.
Leave the minions up while you set up - once all three die, the 450 Star AoE fires every round instead of every other round (he does drop his own wards then).
Blade up, strip the shield, and finish with one big hit.
cheatNotes: He starts the fight behind a -85% Tower Shield. Attacking into it wastes your hit.
Any damage makes him re-cast the Tower Shield, so you cannot simply break it with a wand hit.
Ward-removal spells (Steal Ward, Shatter and similar) take the shield without triggering a replacement.
Once all three minions are down, he stops maintaining the Tower Shield.
Every second round a Star spell hits your whole team for 450 - budget heals for it.
The AoE sweeps right-to-left, then left-to-right, alternating each time - useful for planning who gets hit first and who is hit last.
With all minions dead, the 450 AoE comes every round - do not clear minions until you are close to killing him.

Exploit this one: shield a wizard who is not the last target of the AoE. The AoE stops on them, and he cleanses all wards from that wizard AND himself - his Tower Shield included, with no replacement.
After the last minion falls he strips all wards off himself anyway - the shield stops being a problem in the final phase.
